/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/ar qc libStaticGLEW.a CMakeFiles/StaticGLEW.dir/StaticGLEW_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StaticGLEW.dir/glew/src/glew.c.o CMakeFiles/StaticGLEW.dir/src/tesselation/shapetesselation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StaticGLEW.dir/src/shapes/Cube.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StaticGLEW.dir/src/shapes/Sphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StaticGLEW.dir/src/shapes/Cone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StaticGLEW.dir/src/shapes/Cylinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StaticGLEW.dir/src/shapes/Triangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StaticGLEW.dir/src/shapes/Tet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StaticGLEW.dir/src/utils/camera/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StaticGLEW.dir/src/tesselation/shapecache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StaticGLEW.dir/src/utils/objloader.cpp.o
/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/ranlib libStaticGLEW.a
